sections.label: Chorus
lines: Jesuh’n dialkhai nuai-ah, galdo makaih hi;
Hih leitung gal khempeuh, thuman tawh zo

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Pasian’ hotna muang in, gal i zawh mateng;
A siangtho tupna ah, thumanin ding ni;
Pasian’ adingin ah, khut le khe zang ni.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Galkap honpite in, pai kawmin lasa;
Phat ni Kumpipa min, eite makaipa;
I awging kiza hi, kuanin mainawt un.
